basic.title: Basic
basic.subtitle: Full workflow access for early marketing and product trial

premium.title: Premium
premium.subtitle: 100 social media accounts, locked by Repliz
items: Multi-PC usage allowed with the same registered Repliz account

business.title: Business
business.subtitle: Multi-PC and multi-account business deployment
items: Special pricing based on business needs

notes: Premium remains active only when the connected Repliz account matches the registered licensed account.
If a different Repliz account is used, the application automatically runs in Basic mode.
Business plans are managed directly by admin for multi-PC and large-scale account usage.
